prompt.content:
The client wants updated 2025 financial statement projections reflecting new Capex. Create a new worksheet with the following metrics:

Income Statement: 2025 Sales, Gross Profit, Operating Profit, Net Income from Continuing Operations.
Balance Sheet: 2025 Total Assets, Total Liabilities.
Cash Flow Statement: 2025 Net Income, Operating, Investing, and Financing Cash Flow.

Report all metrics in $M, rounded to the nearest $M.

Use the ResourceCo financial statements spreadsheet and apply the below assumptions.

 For the 2025 Income Statement: 
- Revenue increases 4% vs. 2024
- COGS remains the same percentage of revenue as 2024
- Reclamation & Remediation increases 40% vs. 2023
- Apply the 2025 tax rate from the latest Scenario B data center model
- Set 2025 Advanced projects, research & development equal to Year 0 Capex from the Scenario B model added to 2024 Advanced projects, research & development
-2025 Depreciation & Amortization equals 2024 D&A plus 20% of 2025 Advanced projects, R&D.

For the 2025 Balance Sheet, use 2024 values and assume:
- Property, plant and mine development, net increases by the sum of Years 0–2 Capex from the Scenario B model, financed 25% by short-term debt and 75% by long-term debt, reflected in liabilities.

For the 2025 Cash Flow Statement, use 2024 values and assume:
- Net Income equals updated 2025 Net Income from Continuing Operations
- Depreciation & Amortization equals the 2025 Income Statement value
- Add the new short- and long-term debt to Financing Cash Flow. Subtract total added debt from Investing Cash Flow under Additions to property, plant and mine development

Assume all 2025 values equal 2024 values unless explicitly stated otherwise.

rubrics.name: States 2025 Sales is $21,601 million (acceptable range $21,385 to $21,817) (ver_91d48742d0384930857ea387f8fbc902)

messages.content: States 2025 Sales is $21,601 million (acceptable range $21,385 to $21,817).

rubrics.name: States 2025 Sales is any value other than $21,601 million (ver_91d48742d0384930857ea387f8fbc902)
